hero.subheadline: Premium grooming for those who know the difference. Walk in, sit down, walk out sharper — by appointment or by chance.

locations.headline: Our
locations.homeVisitCashNote: Cash payment on the day. No card required at booking.

payment.cashInstructions: Pay {total} in cash at your appointment. Cancellations are free; let us know in advance.

confirmation.headline: You're all set!
